title: RAM Sticks Plus
description: A Retexture of several food items for protogens!
body:
This pack retextures and renames several food items to different RAM sticks, perfect for any protogen to eat! While it focuses on cooked foods, there are some beyond that, including some you should never eat!
The renames are in the English language. Most (if not all) languages contain the renames.
Credit to HachiroMW for the base texture from the RAM Stick Delight Pack, it will be linked here: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ram-stick-delight

In the future, most food items will be retextured to be RAM.
